# servicenow_content_css (Data Source)

`servicenow_content_css` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single content management style sheet in ServiceNow by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing content management style sheet in ServiceNow by name.
data "servicenow_content_css" "example" {
  name = "my-content-css"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the content management style sheet.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
- `style` (String) Used when 'type' is set to 'local'. The raw CSS content of this style sheet.
- `type` (String) The type of this content management style sheet. Can be 'link' or 'local'.
- `url` (String) Used when 'type' is set to 'link'. Must be an absolute URL to an external style sheet file.
